user.title: Connect to Beestat
user.description: Enter your Beestat API key. You can find it at https://app.beestat.io → Menu → API Key.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate BuzzBridge
reauth_confirm.description: Your Beestat API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new one.

error.invalid_api_key_format: Invalid API key format. Must be 40 hex characters.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key or session expired. Please check your key.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Beestat API. Please try again later.

abort.already_configured: This Beestat account is already configured.

init.title: BuzzBridge Settings
init.description: Configure polling intervals. Lower values give faster updates but use more API calls (limit: ~30/min).

data_description.fast_poll_interval: Thermostat state, sensors, air quality (3-60 min, default 5)
